hooks.command: CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then if [ -f package.json ] && grep -q '"test"' package.json; then npm test 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; elif [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then python -m pytest 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; elif [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then cargo test 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then go test ./... 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED: tests failed — fix before committing' >&2; exit 2; }; fi; fi; exit 0
